description: Member calling about plan coverage and prescription refill

member.name: Maria Santiago
member.address: 34 Pine Street, Apt 5B, San Francisco, CA 94109

mockAHISResponse.summary: Maria Santiago is a 52-year-old female member with active Premium HDHP and Gold Dental coverage through Makana Health. She has been managing Type 2 Diabetes and Depression with regular physician visits. Her prescription for Metformin is due for refill, and she has an upcoming annual checkup scheduled for December 20th.

insights.title: Prescription Refill Due
insights.description: Metformin 500mg prescription is due for refill on December 15th. Patient should contact pharmacy or physician to ensure continuity of care.

insights.title: Plan Coverage Active
insights.description: Member has active health and dental coverage through July 2025. No coverage gaps identified.

insights.title: Upcoming Preventive Care
insights.description: Annual checkup scheduled with primary physician Dr. Will Thomas. Recommend confirming appointment and any pre-visit requirements.

suggestedActions.title: Process Prescription Refill
suggestedActions.description: Assist member with initiating prescription refill for Metformin through pharmacy system

suggestedActions.title: Confirm Upcoming Appointment
suggestedActions.description: Verify annual checkup appointment details and send confirmation to member

suggestedActions.title: Create Follow-up Case
suggestedActions.description: If issue not resolved, create case for follow-up by care coordination team

changesSinceLastVisit: Annual checkup appointment added to calendar
Previous plan inquiry case was closed
